title: santolina rosmarinifolia subsp. rosmarinifolia
intro: Santolina rosmarinifolia subsp. rosmarinifolia, also known as Cotton Lavender or Grey Santolina, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, promoting digestion, and helping to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Santolina rosmarinifolia subsp. rosmarinifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in potpourri and dried flower arrangements to create a fragrant and soothing atmosphere.
